MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-10-2008 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION, 301, DEFENDANTS GREGORY SCHULTZ AND BRUCE GRENKE'S MOTION TO REQUIRE APPELLANT JOE D. TURNER TO POST BOND OR UNDERTAKING PENDING APPEAL FROM JUDGMENT AWARDING ATTORNEYS' FEES AND COSTS TO RESPONDENTS IS DENIED. EVEN ASSUMING THE COURT HAS DISCRETION, IT WOULD NOT REQUIRE A BOND IN THIS CASE. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR# 8189
